# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Usually only the latest daily tag is supported at all,
because that's the current I'm using.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please send me email directly to the email in my profile.
I'd appreciate a link to the release the vulnerability was
found in, and what the vulnerable code/dependency is.

I will acknowledge reports within 7 days and aim to issue a
fix or public advisory within 30 days. If I have not responded
within 14 days, feel free to disclose publicly.
